name: faculty-feedback-system
description: Faculty Feedback System — monorepo with React frontend, Express backend, FastAPI AI service, and PostgreSQL/Redis

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend,ai-service -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../ai-service && pip install -r requirements.txt
